name: plugin-architecture-dev
description: Language-agnostic, full-SDLC master plugin. A frontline orchestrator classifies intent and drives seven phases (research, planning, architecting, implementation, review, testing) into a hook-enforced, evidence-based hard quality gate, fanning out named multi-agent rosters at every phase. Internally pluggable: phases are contribution points, hooks are the event bus, capability detection lazily activates optional accelerators (codemunch, basic-memory, chrome, gemini, codex).
